title: Tracing the Roots
observed_public_files: OpenReview supplement ZIP; four CIFAR10 diffusion-trajectory feature tensors; verified tensor hashes; replayed AUC 0.815826, accuracy 0.7375, TPR@1%FPR 0.134, TPR@0.1%FPR 0.038
consumer_question: Can this public feature-packet-only evidence serve as a provenance-limited E2 false-promotion review row without being counted as N50 denominator evidence?
notes: Public supplement identity and tensor-role binding are adequate for feature-packet-level review, and replay metrics are hash-aligned. However raw target checkpoint identity and raw sample IDs are absent, and the materials explicitly keep this outside the N50 denominator / external adjudication boundary; use only as bounded Research-side support.
